bird.name: 茶色雕
bird.summary: 茶色雕（英語：Tawny eagle，学名：Aquila rapax），别称草原鹰、黑鵰、花鵰、塔斯、乌小猊、小花皂雕，为鹰科鵰属的鸟类，分布在非洲和南亚地区。一般生活于草原和山脉。该物种的模式产地在非洲南部。 描述 草原雕长度为60-75厘米，翼展159-190厘米。重量范围…

locations.summary: 赞比亚共和国（英語：Republic of Zambia），也稱尚比亞（英語：Zambia），是非洲東南部的一個內陸國家。与刚果民主共和国、坦桑尼亚、马拉维、莫桑比克、津巴布韦、博茨瓦纳、纳米比亚和安哥拉相邻。首都是卢萨卡。 历史 二千年…

relations.subject: 茶色雕
relations.evidence: The African population can be found in three, fairly discrete populations. One of these is found in North Africa in south-central Morocco, possibly northern Algeria, southwestern Mauritania, Senegambia, southern Mali, central and southern Niger eastward through southern Chad, northern and central Sudan to most of Ethiopia and Somalia (but for the northeast and central-east).Isenmann P

relations.subject: 茶色雕
relations.evidence: British Ornithologists' Union. In east Africa and central Africa, the tawny eagle is found in central and eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and throughout the drier portions of Uganda and in the entire nations of Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia (quite often residing in the Luangwa valley and the Chambeshi drainage), Malawi and Mozambique

relations.subject: 茶色雕
relations.evidence: Numerous factors, particularly loss of nesting habitat due to logging and global warming, as well as persecution (largely via poisoning) and other anthropogenic mortality (largely through contact with various manmade objects) are driving the once numerous tawny eagle perhaps to the brink of extinction.{{cite journal |last1=Wichmann |first1=M
relations.object_summary: 长期升温改变海冰和海洋环境条件。

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 茶色雕
relations.evidence: Biological Conservation, 144(2), 746-752. Further threats to tawny eagles include habitat loss and land-use changes such as intensified cattle grazing, firewood collection and sale and the charcoal industry. Such culling of the spare trees of arid India seem to be the primary driver of less understand decline of tawny eagles in India. A seemingly higher instance of bacterial infections also seems to affecting the tawny eagles of India.Dutta, T
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 茶色雕
relations.evidence: It was found that the projected decline of tawny eagles from climate change, which is already underway, begun via impact population persistence, first effecting population dynamics, the composition of biological communities and finally biodiversity.Wichmann, M
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
